user_request: Prepare a detailed plaint for recovery of Rs.15,00,000/- advanced as a hand loan by bank transfer. There is no written agreement. The transaction is supported by bank statement and WhatsApp communications. The Defendant has failed to repay despite repeated oral demands and legal notice. Plead limitation properly. Claim interest at 12% per annum from date of loan till realization. Draft strictly in accordance with Order VII CPC. Include proper cause of action, jurisdiction, valuation, court fee and prayer clause. Use formal Indian court language suitable for filing before City Civil Court, Bengaluru.

facts.summary: Recovery of Rs. 15,00,000/- advanced as a hand loan via bank transfer without a written agreement. Transaction is supported by bank statement and WhatsApp communications. Defendant failed to repay despite repeated oral demands and legal notice.

chronology.event: Loan of Rs. 15,00,000/- advanced via bank transfer
Repeated oral demands made for repayment
Defendant failed to repay the amount

evidence.description: Evidence of the bank transfer of Rs. 15,00,000/-
Legal notice sent to the defendant demanding repayment
evidence.relevance: Proof of demand prior to suit

slots.value: From date of loan till realization

missing_fields: Specific date of cause of action accrual
assumptions: Suit is filed within 3 years from date of cause of action
City Civil Court Bengaluru has pecuniary jurisdiction
WhatsApp communications are admissible as secondary evidence

R.1. Particulars to be contained in plaint.
The plaint shall contain the following particulars: 
(a) the name of the Court in which the suit is brought;
(b) the name, description and place of residence of the plaintiff;
(c) the name, description and place of residence of the defendant, so far as they can be asc ertained;
(d) where the plaintiff or the defendant is a minor or a person of unsound mind, a statement to that effect;
(e) the facts constituting the cause of act ion and when it arose;
(f) the facts showing that the Court has jurisdiction;
(g) the relief which the plaintiff claims;
(h) where the plaintiff has allowed a set off or relinquished a portion of his claim, the amount so allowed or 
relinquished; and
(i) a statement of the value of the subject matter of the suit for the purpose of jurisdiction and of court-fees, so far as 
the case admits.

draft_artifacts.title: Plaint for Recovery of Money - Hand Loan
draft_artifacts.text:
IN THE CITY CIVIL COURT, BENGALURU

SUIT NO. {{SUIT_NUMBER}} OF {{SUIT_YEAR}}

{{PLAINTIFF_NAME}},
{{PLAINTIFF_AGE}}, {{PLAINTIFF_OCCUPATION}},
Residing at: {{PLAINTIFF_ADDRESS}}
                                    … PLAINTIFF

VERSUS

{{DEFENDANT_NAME}},
{{DEFENDANT_AGE}}, {{DEFENDANT_OCCUPATION}},
Residing at: {{DEFENDANT_ADDRESS}}
                                    … DEFENDANT

SUIT FOR RECOVERY OF RS. 15,00,000/- (RUPEES FIFTEEN LAKHS ONLY) WITH INTEREST THEREON @ 12% PER ANNUM

The Plaintiff above named respectfully submits as follows:

1. That this Plaint is being filed in accordance with the mandatory particulars prescribed under Order VII Rule 1 of the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908, read with Section 20 of the Karnataka Court-fees and Suits Valuation Act, 1958, seeking recovery of a hand loan amount of Rs. 15,00,000/- (Rupees Fifteen Lakhs only) advanced by the Plaintiff to the Defendant.

2. That the Plaintiff is {{PLAINTIFF_OCCUPATION}} by profession and is residing at {{PLAINTIFF_ADDRESS}} within the jurisdiction of this Hon'ble Court. The Defendant is {{DEFENDANT_OCCUPATION}} residing at {{DEFENDANT_ADDRESS}}. The Defendant is personally known to the Plaintiff.

3. That on or about {{DATE_OF_LOAN}}, the Defendant approached the Plaintiff and requested a hand loan of Rs. 15,00,000/- (Rupees Fifteen Lakhs only) for {{LOAN_PURPOSE_PLACEHOLDER}}. The Plaintiff agreed to advance the said amount to the Defendant on the mutual understanding that the Defendant would repay the same within {{REPAYMENT_PERIOD_PLACEHOLDER}} together with interest at the rate of 12% per annum. No written agreement or promissory note was executed in respect of the said transaction, and the arrangement was purely oral.

4. That in pursuance of the said oral agreement, on {{DATE_OF_LOAN}}, the Plaintiff transferred the sum of Rs. 15,00,000/- from his/her bank account bearing {{BANK_ACCOUNT_DETAILS_PLAINTIFF}} to the Defendant's bank account bearing {{BANK_ACCOUNT_DETAILS_DEFENDANT}} through bank transfer, as evidenced by the bank statement marked as Annexure-A.

5. That the said transaction, though oral and not reduced to writing, is corroborated by subsequent WhatsApp communications exchanged between the parties, wherein the Defendant has acknowledged the receipt of the said amount and the obligation to repay the same. The relevant WhatsApp chat screenshots are marked as Annexure-B.

6. That despite repeated oral demands made by the Plaintiff from time to time, the Defendant failed and neglected to repay the aforesaid amount. Consequently, the Plaintiff caused a legal notice dated {{DATE_OF_LEGAL_NOTICE}} to be issued to the Defendant demanding repayment of the principal amount along with accrued interest thereon within 15 days of the receipt thereof. The legal notice along with the postal acknowledgment is marked as Annexure-C.

7. That the Defendant has failed to comply with the lawful demands made in the said legal notice and has thereby refused to repay the said amount. The Defendant is liable to pay the principal sum of Rs. 15,00,000/- together with interest thereon at the agreed rate of 12% per annum from the date of loan, i.e., {{DATE_OF_LOAN}}, till the date of realization.

CAUSE OF ACTION:

8. That the cause of action for the present suit first arose on {{DATE_OF_LOAN}} when the Plaintiff advanced the loan amount to the Defendant. The right to sue accrued on {{DATE_OF_CAUSE_OF_ACTION_ACCRUAL}} when the Defendant failed to repay the amount despite oral demands and subsequent legal notice dated {{DATE_OF_LEGAL_NOTICE}}. The cause of action is not a continuing one. The present suit is filed within the period of limitation prescribed under Article 113 of the Limitation Act, 1963, being three years from the date when the right to sue accrued.

JURISDICTION:

9. That the Defendant resides and/or carries on business at {{DEFENDANT_ADDRESS}}, which falls within the territorial jurisdiction of this Hon'ble Court. The transaction was also effected through bank transfer to an account maintained by the Defendant within the jurisdiction of this Court. The subject matter of the suit is valued at Rs. 15,00,000/- (Rupees Fifteen Lakhs only), which is well within the pecuniary jurisdiction of this Hon'ble City Civil Court, Bengaluru.

VALUATION AND COURT FEE:

10. That for the purpose of jurisdiction and court fees, the present suit is valued at Rs. 15,00,000/- (Rupees Fifteen Lakhs only), being the precise amount claimed as per Order VII Rule 2 of the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908. The requisite ad valorem court fee of {{COURT_FEE_AMOUNT}} has been paid on the said valuation as per the provisions of the Karnataka Court-fees and Suits Valuation Act, 1958.

EVIDENCE:

11. That the Plaintiff relies upon the following documents in support of the claim:
    a) Bank Statement showing transfer of Rs. 15,00,000/- (Annexure-A);
    b) WhatsApp Communications exchanged between the parties evidencing acknowledgment of debt (Annexure-B);
    c) Legal Notice dated {{DATE_OF_LEGAL_NOTICE}} along with postal receipts/acknowledgment (Annexure-C).

PRAYER:

    WHEREFORE, it is most respectfully prayed that this Hon'ble Court may be pleased to:

    a) Pass a decree for recovery of Rs. 15,00,000/- (Rupees Fifteen Lakhs only) in favour of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant;

    b) Pass a decree for interest at the rate of 12% per annum on the said principal amount from {{DATE_OF_LOAN}} till the date of realization;

    c) Award costs of the suit to the Plaintiff;

    d) Grant any other relief or reliefs that this Hon'ble Court may deem fit and proper in the facts and circumstances of the case.

VERIFICATION:

    I, {{PLAINTIFF_NAME}}, the Plaintiff above named, do hereby solemnly affirm and state that the contents of paras 1 to 11 are true to my personal knowledge and belief, and that the contents of the remaining paragraphs are based on legal advice and records maintained by me, which I believe to be true. No part of this plaint is false and nothing material has been concealed therefrom.

    Verified at Bengaluru on this {{VERIFICATION_DATE}} day of {{VERIFICATION_MONTH}}, {{VERIFICATION_YEAR}}.

    Sd/-
    {{PLAINTIFF_NAME}}
    Plaintiff

LIST OF DOCUMENTS:

1. Annexure-A: Bank Statement evidencing transfer of Rs. 15,00,000/- from Plaintiff to Defendant
2. Annexure-B: WhatsApp Communications between Plaintiff and Defendant regarding the loan
3. Annexure-C: Legal Notice dated {{DATE_OF_LEGAL_NOTICE}} along with postal acknowledgment
